function.name: search_documents_by_title
function.long_description: Searches document titles to retrieve documents matching or similar to a given title.
example_user_queries: Search for documents with titles matching "annual budget".
Find documents whose title contains "incident postmortem".
Look up titles related to "vendor agreement".
Find documents with "employee handbook" in the title.
Show files whose title matches "customer retention".
Search document titles for "server hardening checklist".
